children.text: Seller experience matters, but direct seller_id modelling is unstable.
seller relativity = Z x observed A/E + (1 - Z) x 1.0

Shrink target = seller's GLM base expected loss,
not portfolio average price.
Portfolio normalization preserves total GLM expected loss after seller relativities.
This lets large sellers carry more of their own experience while small sellers remain close to their GLM risk mix.
